title: gladiolus vigilans
intro: Gladiolus vigilans, also known as the 'prairie coreopsis', is a flowering plant species native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus vigilans include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus vigilans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
